itemdesc-wolfears: The ears of the yellow-eyed, fleabitten psychotic who runs Porta Aurea
itemdesc-madkingcrown: In hindsight, maybe I shouldn't have given him this. In my defense, it was very funny though...
itemdesc-vulkhat: A grand stovepipe hat that sports a heavy brass gear. Consider your punk steam'd
itemdesc-vulkdimmadome: I'm Vulk Dimmadome, owner of the Gildsdale Dimmadome! Thank you for saving my child Coal-Titan Dimmadome, heir to the Gildsdale Dimmadome fortune!
itemdesc-boater: The oversized crown of Marentia Aurea, after it was recovered from between the couch cushions it was mounted on a straw hat because it was too big to wear.
blockdesc-relic: Andy...I've done a bad thing. And so have you.
blockdesc-telex: A strange piece of equipment that serves little purpose when separated from a much larger machine...
